medical_history.history_of_present_illness: F with h/o PMH/PVD, multiple previous admissions p/w c/o worsening of known R foot ulcer. Pt states that her ulcer had previously been healing well and ~6wks ago acutely worsened. She was seen at an OSH where she was started on IV vancomycin and noticed an acute worsening of the ulceration.
medical_history.past_medical_history: PMH: DM1, Triopathy, CAD, CHF EF 42%, CRI, venous stasis, MRSA, PVD, angina PSH: multiple foot surgeries, L BKA, CABG x3.

physical_examination.specialty_examination: CV: RRR, Pulm: CTAB, Abd: Soft NTND, Ext: s/p L BKA w/ prosthesis in place, R: Erythema to mid ankle. 2+ pitting edema ~ 3cm ulceration does not probe to bone.
